title: hieracium microtum subsp. armenum
intro: Hieracium microtum subsp. armenum is a subspecies of Hieracium microtum, a small perennial plant in the dandelion family, native to the Caucasus region. It is known for its medicinal properties, primarily used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders, respiratory problems, and skin conditions. Hieracium microtum subsp. armenum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a valuable herbal remedy for those seeking natural health benefits.
